meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Debugging Bottlenecks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to debug faster, ship cleaner code, and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates debugging friction by enforcing strict architectural boundaries and automated observability. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your codebase into an AI-navigable environment. This combination allows you to diagnose complex logic errors instantly, drastically reducing downtime and ensuring your client deliverables remain on schedule.
content.intro:
You are staring at a screen filled with red stack traces, the clock is ticking toward a client deadline, and your codebase feels like a labyrinth with no exit. The pressure to ship is immense, but the code is brittle. Every fix seems to introduce two new bugs, turning your development process into a high-stakes game of whack-a-mole.

It is time to abandon the manual struggle. The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it is an architectural safeguard designed to make your code transparent to AI agents. By standardizing your structure and leveraging Claude Code, you regain control over your development velocity and turn debugging from a nightmare into a routine task.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project structure that ensures AI tools can index and understand your entire dependency graph.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure using the Antigravity template, ensuring all modular components are clearly defined for AI readability.

steps.title: Inject Observability Hooks
steps.description: Add diagnostic middleware to your template so that errors are caught and logged with full context before they crash the runtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add comprehensive logging and error-boundary middleware to the base controller, ensuring all exceptions include a full stack trace and state snapshot.

steps.title: Map the Failure Points
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform an automated audit of your current logic to identify where your code is prone to silent failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for potential race conditions and null-pointer risks. Create a report of all identified failure points.

steps.title: Automated Debugging Cycle
steps.description: Trigger a recursive debugging session where Claude Code attempts to reproduce and patch specific reported errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Debug the current failing test suite. Reproduce the error in a temporary sandbox, apply the fix, and verify it passes.

steps.title: Validate Architectural Integrity
steps.description: Ensure the final code adheres to the Antigravity design patterns to prevent future regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Validate the current codebase against the Antigravity architecture standards. Suggest refactors for any deviations.

pro_tips: Always keep a 'context.md' file in the root directory that Claude Code can read to understand your client's specific business logic constraints.
Use Antigravity's 'sandbox' mode for testing complex refactors without polluting your production-ready git branch.
Set up a pre-commit hook that triggers a lightweight Claude Code scan to catch linting errors before they hit your repo.
When debugging, provide the AI with the specific 'user journey' that led to the crash, not just the code snippet.
Modularize your API responses into 'Antigravity Envelopes' to ensure the AI can parse error messages consistently across all endpoints.
content.next_steps: Once your debugging workflow is automated, implement a CI/CD pipeline that integrates these Claude Code checks as a final gate before deployment.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start building the future. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
